mapper.select: SELECT m.MIDDLEWARE_ID, m.MIDDLEWARE_NAME, m.MIDDLEWARE_URL, m.API_KEY, m.STATUS, m.LAST_HEARTBEAT, m.PRIORITY, m.DESCRIPTION, m.CREATE_AT, m.MODIFY_AT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM R_DEVICE_T d WHERE d.MIDDLEWARE_ID = m.MIDDLEWARE_ID AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL) AS DEVICE_COUNT FROM R_MIDDLEWARE_T m ORDER BY m.PRIORITY, m.MIDDLEWARE_ID

SELECT m.MIDDLEWARE_ID, m.MIDDLEWARE_NAME, m.MIDDLEWARE_URL, m.API_KEY, m.STATUS, m.LAST_HEARTBEAT, m.PRIORITY, m.DESCRIPTION, m.CREATE_AT, m.MODIFY_AT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM R_DEVICE_T d WHERE d.MIDDLEWARE_ID = m.MIDDLEWARE_ID AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL) AS DEVICE_COUNT FROM R_MIDDLEWARE_T m WHERE m.MIDDLEWARE_ID = #{middlewareId}
SELECT m.* FROM R_MIDDLEWARE_T m JOIN R_DEVICE_T d ON d.MIDDLEWARE_ID = m.MIDDLEWARE_ID WHERE d.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE R_MIDDLEWARE_T SET MIDDLEWARE_NAME = #{MIDDLEWARE_NAME}, MIDDLEWARE_URL = #{MIDDLEWARE_URL}, API_KEY = #{API_KEY}, STATUS = #{STATUS}, PRIORITY = #{PRIORITY}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, MODIFY_AT = NOW() WHERE MIDDLEWARE_ID = #{MIDDLEWARE_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM R_DEVICE_T WHERE MIDDLEWARE_ID = #{middlewareId} AND DELETE_AT IS NULL
